summary: Encodes a signed integer into a Base64 VLQ string.
signature_intent: Accepts one signed integer-like value and returns a string representation in Base64 VLQ format.
behavior: Converts the signed input into the VLQ signed-number representation.
Emits one or more Base64 characters representing the encoded value.
Uses continuation markers for all output chunks except the final chunk.
edge_cases: Small magnitudes produce a single-character encoding.
Negative values are represented distinctly from positive values of the same magnitude.
forbidden_details: Do not mention local identifier names.
Do not mention repository or file location.
Do not describe incidental loop structure or temporary storage.
